title: Ping
description: Send ICMP pings between two VMs on a shared network.

title: IRC Chat
description: Run an IRC server and connect multiple VMs as chat clients.

title: Routing
description: Explore IP routing across multiple subnets with a router VM.

title: etcd

title: The End
